name: BigBear.ai Holdings, Inc.
summary: BigBear.ai Holdings, Inc. is a specialized provider of mission-ready AI technology serving defense, national security, travel, and trade markets. The company offers products including Ask Sage (a FedRAMP-authorized generative AI platform), ConductorOS (an AI/data/sensor orchestration platform for edge defense environments), computer vision, biometrics, predictive analytics, and digital identity verification solutions. Founded to serve defense and national security customers, BigBear.ai also partners with select commercial clients for supply chain transparency and process optimization.

products.name: Ask Sage
products.description: FedRAMP-authorized, platform-agnostic generative AI solution designed for defense and intelligence customers, certified for DoD IL5, IL6, and Top-Secret use.

products.name: ConductorOS
products.description: AI, data, and sensor orchestration platform for distributed, mission-critical defense edge environments, enabling split-second inference and autonomy.

products.name: Digital Identity / Biometrics
products.description: Vision AI-based identity verification and biometrics software leveraging machine learning for accurate individual authentication in security and commercial contexts.

products.name: Operational Readiness Solutions
products.description: Decision support tools combining subject matter expertise and technology to forecast manpower, equipment, and supply chain data for defense operators.
